description_long: This is a two-story suburban house surrounded by a rectangular walled yard, featuring a flat roof and a mix of brick and concrete exterior. The front facade has a prominent garage door, arched windows, and a small staircase leading to the main entrance. The property includes landscaped elements such as palm trees and dense shrubbery, mainly concentrated at the rear and sides of the lot. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with large rectangular panes and some arched designs on the front and back. The house is set back from the street, with a driveway leading to the garage and a fenced perimeter providing privacy. The overall design is simple and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on clean lines.
description: A two-story brick house with a flat roof, arched windows, and a walled yard featuring palm trees and shrubs. The front includes a garage and a small staircase entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage door, arched windows, main entrance with steps, and a portion of the walled yard with trees in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long brick wall, flat roof, and the arrangement of windows and landscaping along the side yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, arched windows, and dense shrubbery within the enclosed yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, side windows, and the distribution of trees and shrubs along the perimeter wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with arched and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small staircase, arched doorway, and minimal overhang, adjacent to a garage door.
